summary: Completed testing of 6 UI refinements for CRM production system (MOS SYSTEM). All features implemented correctly and working as expected. Backend API returns expanded client list (27 clients) and 3 shipping options. Frontend displays enhanced board indicator, conditional Nueva Orden button, colored status badges, and all bulk actions are functional.

minor.issue: Returns PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE in boards list (by design for internal use, frontend filters it out)
minor.note: Working as intended - frontend correctly excludes it from dropdown

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console about span elements inside tr/tbody - cosmetic issue only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Board indicator shows gradient background with unique colors per board
Board name displays in large text (3xl) with 'Tablero Activo' subtitle
Column headers have increased font size (text-base font-extrabold)
'Nueva Orden' button ONLY visible when currentBoard is SCHEDULING
'Nueva Orden' button hidden on MASTER, BLANKS, MAQUINA boards
PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE is NOT shown in board selector dropdown
Status colors display correctly with colored badges (RUSH=red, PRIORITY 1=red, TARGET=blue, etc.)
Add Column button (PlusCircle icon) visible and opens AddColumnModal
Backend /api/config/options returns 27 clients and 3 shipping options
Board selector dropdown works and changes displayed board
Bulk actions bar appears when orders selected (Mover a, Excel, Papelera)
Automations modal opens and shows existing automation rules
Admin user sees Activity Log and Manage Options buttons
Order count updates correctly when switching boards
MASTER board shows all orders across boards
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console - span elements inside tr/tbody/th can cause issues. Consider wrapping table row/cell iterators differently to avoid hydration mismatches. Low priority cosmetic issue.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 UI refinements implemented and verified

seed_data_creation: Created test admin user and session in MongoDB for authenticated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 UI refinements from the original request have been verified: 1) Papelera as icon only (not in board dropdown), 2) Nueva Orden button conditional on SCHEDULING, 3) Increased column header font size, 4) Enhanced board indicator with gradient/large text, 5) Status colors with colored badges matching reference, 6) Add Column button visible. Backend expanded clients list to 27 entries. Test user created with admin role for authenticated testing.

features_verified.papelera_as_icon: PASS - Not shown in board selector, only as action button 'Papelera' in bulk actions
features_verified.nueva_orden_scheduling_only: PASS - Button only appears when currentBoard === 'SCHEDULING'
features_verified.column_headers_larger_font: PASS - Headers use text-base font-extrabold with wider default widths
features_verified.board_indicator_enhanced: PASS - Gradient backgrounds, 3xl board name text, 'Tablero Activo' subtitle
features_verified.status_colors_reference: PASS - Colored badges display for Priority (RUSH=red), Cliente (TARGET=blue), etc.
features_verified.add_column_button: PASS - PlusCircle icon visible in board indicator bar, opens AddColumnModal
features_verified.shipping_options: PASS - 3 shipping options: CUSTOMER, CUSTOMER WILL PROVIDE LABELS, SHIPPING
